title: App Defaults 2026
summary: An update to my default apps list
content:
It's been a couple of years since my first post in this series. In 2024 I did an "updates only" list but I think it's worth going for a full list again this time.

  • 📨 Mail Client: Apple Mail still. Email sucks, I don't need it to be better I need it to go away.
  • 📮 Mail Server: iCloud with custom domain.
  • 📝 Notes: Obsidian. I've just done a big reset of all my notes and I'm following Steph Ango's structure somewhat.
  • ✅ To-Do: Journal for untimed things, Reminders for timed.
  • 📷 iPhone Photo Shooting: Camera.app
  • 🟦 Photo Management: Photos.app
  • 📆 Calendar: Fantastical
  • 📁 Cloud File Storage: iCloud Drive
  • 📖 RSS: Miniflux with Reeder Classic
  • 🙍🏻‍♂️ Contacts: Contacts.app
  • 🌐 Browser: Safari
  • 💬 Chat: Discord, Signal, IRC
  • 🔖 Bookmarks: LinkAce
  • 📑 Read It Later: Raindrop
  • 📜 Word Processing: what
  • 📈 Spreadsheets: Numbers
  • 📊 Presentations: Keynote if I have to but I never do
  • 🛒 Shopping Lists: Alexa lists, reminders
  • 🍴 Meal Planning: Journal
  • 💰 Budgeting and Personal Finance: Numbers
  • 📰 News: Nope
  • 🎵 Music: Apple Music scrobbled to Last.fm with Sleeve
  • 🎤 Podcasts: Overcast
  • 🔐 Password Management: 1Password, begrudgingly.

When this post is added, that will be five hundred blog posts on the App Defaults website. You should go and listen to the episode that started it all, 097: Duel of the Defaults.
